action_text: Type "Incidents by agent" into the reports list Search field
rationale: Use the list’s built-in Search field to find the report by its title without leaving the View/Run page

action_text: Click the magnifying glass next to the list Search field to execute the search
rationale: After entering the search text, explicitly trigger the list search to filter results

action_text: Press Enter in the reports list Search field
rationale: If the search requires submission via keyboard, press Enter within the Search field to apply the filter

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort the reports list
rationale: If search isn’t responsive, sort by Title to more easily locate the “Incidents by agent” report alphabetically

action_text: Toggle the Show/Hide filter (list filter builder) for the reports list
rationale: If available, open the list filter builder to set a condition Title contains "Incidents by agent"
